summary: Fox News split-screen live TV interview between an anchor and an ICE official discussing 214 arrests of illegal alien child sex offenders in the Houston area. It is a straight broadcast-news talking-head segment with a chyron, not a produced or music-driven piece. No youth-appeal styling, genre experimentation, or music.
notable_text: FOX NEWS / LIVE / EXCLUSIVE / 214 ILLEGAL ALIEN CHILD SEX OFFENDERS ARRESTED / FOX NEWS ALERT
